title: US–Iran–Israel War: Impact on Water Prices in India
body: Rising crude oil prices are pushing up PET plastic costs. We are absorbing these pressures to protect your bulk order pricing for as long as possible.

title: Local Brand, Local Supply — We Will Not Let You Down
body: Anjani Water is bottled entirely within Gujarat. Your weddings, events and daily needs in Vadodara will never face a shortage due to global conflicts.
